title: Proclamation No. 1545, s. 2008
text:
PROCLAMATION NO. 1545

DECLARING FRIDAY, JULY 4, 2008, AS SPECIAL (NON-WORKING) DAY IN THE CITY OF CADIZ

WHEREAS, Friday, July 4, 2008, marks the 41 st Charter Day anniversary of the City of Cadiz;

WHEREAS, it is but fitting and proper that the people of the City of Cadiz be given full opportunity to celebrate the occasion with appropriate ceremonies.

NOW, THEREFORE, I, EDUARDO R. ERMITA, Executive Secretary, by authority of Her Excellency, GLORIA MACAPAGAL-ARROYO, do hereby declare Friday, July 4, 2008, as special (non-working) day in the City of Cadiz.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 3 rd day of July, in the year of Our Lord, Two Thousand and Eight.

By authority of the President:

Executive Secretary

By the Executive Secretary:

Senior Deputy Executive Secretary
